ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a top-tier horror film, praised for its practical effects, body horror, and enduring suspense. It is consistently listed in top 5 favorites and cited for specific, insane scenes.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended for its monster design, atmosphere, and the genuine fear of a potential real-life scenario. It appears on multiple 'top horror' lists.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Described as a mind-fuck that disturbed viewers for days. Specific scenes (like the car scene and attic scene) are highlighted as particularly impactful, and it's a common favorite.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently named as one of the scariest movies ever made, with users stating it holds up even 50 years later and still 'scares the hell' out of them.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a movie that genuinely terrified viewers and caused long-lasting fear (e.g., nightmares for a decade). Its theater experience is also highlighted as memorable.

ranked_movies.title: Sinister
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for its effective jump scares and, most notably, its incredibly creepy and memorable soundtrack that gives viewers goosebumps.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a deeply disturbing sci-fi horror film, often compared to 'Dead Space'. The recovered video footage scene is specifically called out as crazy.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its brilliant and terrifying concept, unique camera work, and the subtle, lingering horror of the entity always being in the background of wide shots.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Called 'bloody brilliant and absolutely terrifying'. It is a common entry on top horror lists and is recommended for its claustrophobic atmosphere.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a fun, meta horror comedy. It's listed in multiple users' top 5 favorites and is praised for its clever deconstruction of horror tropes.

ranked_movies.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a hidden gem and one of the scariest movies users have seen, praised for its slow-burn atmosphere and effective scares.

ranked_movies.title: Midsommar
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its unique daylight horror and psychological terror. It's a common favorite and some users even mentioned it inspired a change in their lifestyle perspective.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: A classic consistently appearing in top 5 lists. It is recommended for its quality, atmosphere, and lasting impact on the horror genre.

ranked_movies.title: 28 Days Later
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a top favorite by multiple users, praised for reinvigorating the zombie genre and its intense, frantic energy.

ranked_movies.title: Weapons
ranked_movies.reason: A recent release that is highly discussed and recommended. Users praised its unique format, effective creepiness, and its absolutely insane, crowd-pleasing ending.

ranked_movies.title: Evil Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Both the original and the 2013 remake are frequently mentioned. The 2013 version is highlighted for its gruesome, theater-shocking experience and is called 'gnarly and mean'.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: The entire franchise is mentioned as a fun, foundational slasher series that many users grew up with and love. It's the archetype for the 'fun horror movie' request.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: Directly cited in the request for 'fun horror movies' as an example of the desired tone. It is a benchmark for horror comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Salem's Lot
ranked_movies.reason: The 1979 version is the subject of its own dedicated discussion thread, praised for its cast, screenplay, location, and incredibly creepy atmosphere, especially the window scene.

ranked_movies.title: The Strangers
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for creating a fantastic theater experience with audible gasps from the audience. It's cited as a prime example of effective home invasion terror.
